opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My right arm went completely numb and freezing cold an hour ago, and the pain is absolutely agonizing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden severe arm pain with numbness and coldness that started about an hour ago and isn't improving.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden, about 90 minutes ago, while watching television
symptom_narrative.duration: constant and worsening since it started
symptom_narrative.character: severe, unremitting pain, along with pins-and-needles progressing to complete numbness
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right arm, below the elbow, down into the hand and fingers
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing specific, it just came on suddenly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my hand looks pale and waxy, feels perishingly cold, and I'm having trouble gripping things now
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't use my right arm at all, pacing around in distress

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, lost his prescription so has missed his blood thinner for the last 3 days, can't drive due to arm pain/loss of function

objective_data_offered.value: hand and forearm look pale/waxy with some mottling, visible on video

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened about losing his arm, wants urgent help but lives alone with no one to drive him

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes symptoms clearly despite pain and anxiety

access_barriers.transport: lives alone, cannot drive himself due to arm pain and loss of function
